creator: jbeich@FreeBSD.org
text:
> Currently  Firefox  cannot  find  freebsd.org  or FreeBSD.org or  
> Wikipedia.org or  FSF.org or fsf.org  or scientificlinux.org or  any.org.

Either misconfigured networking (i.e., DNS, routing), a kernel or hardware bug. Hardware can be fixed by upgrading/configuring firmware (e.g., BIOS/EFI on motherboard) but otherwise you'd have to replace the defective unit.

Try seeking help on freebsd-questions@ mailing list.
